plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the cached automation instructions were looking for a 'Last Name' field, but the application UI currently displays a 'Your Name' field (identified as 'Set 2' in the screenshot). This mismatch caused the 'inputText' tool to fail while trying to resolve its selectors.
observedIndicators: Visual evidence shows field 'Your Name' instead of expected 'Last Name'
History shows alternating success/failure pattern, typical of rotating UI states
The tool call parameters show the agent was looking for 'input-lastname' which is missing from the current view

remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu cache and re-run the test. This will force the agent to generate fresh instructions that match the 'Set 2' UI structure.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate if DETERMINISTIC mode is suitable for this unstable UI.
remediationSteps.details: If the application intentionally rotates between different question sets, consider disabling DETERMINISTIC mode for this specific test or using a more descriptive prompt that can handle varying field names.

plan.notes: The 'Set 2' badge in the failure screenshot suggests the application rotates between different sets of survey questions. Since the test is running in DETERMINISTIC mode, it relies on a cache that likely contains instructions for 'Set 1'. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-analyze the page and adapt to the current field set.
